name: LocalLens
desc: Local Lens is a privacy-first, AI-powered photo organizer for your PC. Sort and group photos by faces, dates, and locations—all locally, with no cloud upload. …
descFull: Local Lens is a privacy-first, AI-powered photo organizer for your PC. Sort and group photos by faces, dates, and locations—all locally, with no cloud upload. Enjoy a modern, intuitive UI and keep your memories organized and secure on your own device.
